design_philosophy: Executive Dark Mode. High-stakes, minimal, authoritative. No generic SaaS gradients. Color is used strictly for function (e.g., Amber for high 'Probability of Win' scores). The interface feels like a secure, precision financial or military command center.

headings.usage: H1/H2 use extreme tight tracking. No Inter.

body.usage: Used for all readable text, forms, and standard dashboard elements.

data_and_mono.usage: Probability of Win scores, RFPs IDs, timestamps.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing + The 'Control Room' Grid. Minimalist UI with dense functional areas surrounded by vast negative space.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid #262626. Use 'Grid Borders' pattern where possible to expose the skeleton of the layout.

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-black hover:bg-amber-600 rounded-sm font-medium tracking-wide transition-colors uppercase text-xs tracking-[0.1em]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-neutral-700 text-white hover:border-neutral-500 rounded-sm transition-all

inputs.style: bg-black border border-neutral-800 text-white rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 focus:border-amber-500
inputs.labels: text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-neutral-500 mb-2 block

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#030303]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-neutral-800 h-16

kanban_board.column: w-80 flex-shrink-0 flex flex-col gap-4 bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-neutral-800 p-4 rounded-sm
kanban_board.card: bg-[#141414] border border-neutral-800 p-4 cursor-grab hover:border-amber-500/50 transition-colors

badges.high_match: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/20 text-xs uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded-sm tracking-wider

hero_image.description: Abstract glowing data stream turning into a document, used for landing page hero background. Use with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text legibility.

background_texture.description: Minimalist topographic map with amber contours. Use in pricing section or persona setup background with low opacity (10-20%).

logo_placeholder.description: Abstract wave used for placeholder avatar or generic visual element.

landing.structure: Hero with 3D abstract media background -> Value Prop (Grid Borders) -> How it works -> Pricing ($199/mo Pro Tier) -> CTA
landing.hero_overlay: MUST use bg-gradient-to-r from-black via-black/80 to-transparent over the hero image. Left-align typography.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left: Abstract topographic background. Right: Minimalist form (login/signup) centered in its column.

dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Top row: Key metrics (Active Scouts, Pipeline Matches, Pending Reviews). Below: Recent activity feed.
dashboard.metrics: Use large IBM Plex Mono for numbers. Example: 89% PoW.

kanban.layout: Horizontal scrollable board. Columns: Matched, Drafting, Review Required, Submitted. Cards should show RFP ID, Company Name, and PoW Score.
kanban.interactions: Hover states on cards should lighten the border. Scrollbar should be hidden or extremely minimal.

grant_detail.layout: 2-column layout. Left: Metadata (Deadline, Amount, Agency). Right: Detailed PoW calculation breakdown and Action buttons.

draft_review.layout: Distraction-free writing interface. Left: Source material/RFP requirements. Right: AI Draft editor.
draft_review.critical_action: Manual 'Approve & Submit' button MUST be prominent, colored Amber, requiring explicit confirmation (Trust Boundary).

persona_setup.layout: Multi-step or long-scroll form. Sections: Basic Info, Capabilities, Past Performance, Tech Keywords, Geo Focus.

upload_vault.layout: Drag and drop zone with dashed border (border-neutral-700) + list of uploaded PDFs (tone references).

pricing.layout: Bento grid or 2 large cards. Free (1 lead/mo) vs Pro ($199/mo). Pro tier gets the 'Tracing Beam' glowing border effect.

animations.hover_states: Fast, crisp transitions (150ms ease). Buttons invert colors.
animations.page_load: Subtle fade up for dashboard elements using framer-motion. Stagger children by 0.05s.

icons.style: Duotone or bold weight depending on emphasis. Used sparingly.

technical_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='approve-submit-button').
technical_rules.accessibility: Contrast ratios MUST meet WCAG AA. Focus states must use focus:ring-amber-500.
technical_rules.components_lib: Use Shadcn UI with severe custom styling (border-radius: 0 or 2px, dark mode enforced).
